description: CompositionPurple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Gone are the old days of monarchy. Here come the brand new days of free rights and free land. Celebrate this 'free' spirit with the popular song of the Bob Dylan - 'Times...They are a changing'. Pair this tee with cargoes and flaoters for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6'; Shoulders: 18"
